failure_summary: The migration-authority drift blocker no longer reproduces. Both front doors now reach runtime DB authority resolution and fail later because WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL is not configured in /Users/nate/Praxis/.env.
error_chain: storage.postgres.validators.PostgresConfigurationError: WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL must be set in process env or declared in /Users/nate/Praxis/.env

bug_submission.reason: The original migration-drift blocker is resolved in the current tree. Any remaining failure on these commands is now an environment configuration issue, not the claim lifecycle migration authority seam.

proposed_bug.title: claim lifecycle migration policy drift blocks workflow validate and preview before spec load
proposed_bug.description: Historical record only. On April 16, 2026 this blocker no longer reproduced: the claim lifecycle runtime loaded canonical migration statements successfully and the validate/preview front doors progressed past import-time migration authority checks. Current failures on those commands are caused by missing WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL configuration, not migration-policy drift.
